text:
is a Japanese male mangaka and designer. http://wiki.evageeks.org/Ikuto_Yamashita He is the mechanical designer responsable for various designs in the Neon Genesis Evangelion and the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. "Ikuto Yamashita came up with the new designs, which use an apple motif." The new NERV emblem will be a partially eaten Apple, while the SEELE one is composed of an apple and a serpent--a clear reference to Adam and Eve's exile from paradise. Religious symbols played a significant role in the original TV series, and they were responsible for much of the buzz surrounding it. - Newtype USA Feb 2007 He also wrote and illustrated the novel Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA. He also published a collection of unused alternate plans for the series ending and a movie follow up, Sore o Nasumono: Neon Genesis Evangelion Concept Design Works.

Overview

.]] 
Yamashita was born in the Gifu Prefecture and is a graduate of the Nagoya University Of Arts.

Works

Theatrical Films

Evangelion: Death and Rebirth (1997) - Mechanical Design
The End of Evangelion (1997) - Original Mechanical Design
Top wo Nerae! & Top wo Nerae 2! Gattai Movie!!(1997) - Setting
Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone (2007) - Mechanical Design
Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance (2009) - Mechanical Design
Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo (2012) - Mechanical Design, Image Board
Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time (2021) - Design, Key Animation, Main Mechanical Design
Shin Ultraman (2022) - Mechanical and Prop Design
Shin Kamen Rider (2023) - Design

TV Anime/OVA

Gunbuster (1988) - Setting
Nadia, the secret of blue water (1990) - Mechanical Design
Neon Genesis Evangelion (anime) (1995) - Mechanical Design
Blue Submarine No. 6 (1998) - Mechanical Design
Kurogane Communication (1998) - Mechanical Design
Sentou Yousei Yukikaze (2002) - Mechanical Design, Script (Episode 5)
Sentou Yousei Shoujo Tasukete! Mave-chan (2005) - Original Character Design
Kishin Taisen Gigantic Formula (2007) - Mechanical Design (Isthar-XII)
Iconic Field (2015) - Director, Original Creator, Mechanical Design, Character Design
Mobile Suit Gundam GQuuuuuuX (2025) - Mechanical Design

Published works

Dark Whisper (1990) - Writer, Illustrator
BP EMISSION ADVANCED (1996) - Writer, Illustrator
Sore o Nasumono: Neon Genesis Evangelion Concept Design Works (1998) - Writer, Illustrator
Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA (2008) - Writer, Illustrator
Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Visual Book (2010) - Writer, Illustrator http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/people.php?id=3734 
Evangelion ANIMA Ikuto Yamashita Art Book (2025) - Writer, Illustrator

Video Games
 
Neon Genesis Evangelion (Sega Saturn) (1996) - Angel design (Unnamed Angel)
Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden (1997) - Guest Mechanical Design (T•RIDEN•T).
Neon Genesis Evangelions (2003) - Mechanical Design (Jet Alone Kai and Evangelion Unit-01 Type F)
